columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: The division number associated with the order

columns.name: PARTINR
columns.description: The party number related to the order

columns.name: KUNDENR
columns.description: The customer number associated with the order

columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: The contract number related to the order

columns.name: TORT_KVANTUM
columns.description: The quantity of the order or product

columns.name: FORFALLSDATO
columns.description: The due date for payment or delivery

columns.name: FAKTURANR
columns.description: The invoice number associated with the order

columns.name: BELOP
columns.description: The amount of money involved in the order or transaction

columns.name: RABATT
columns.description: The discount applied to the order or product

columns.name: NETTOBELOP
columns.description: The net amount of money after applying any discounts or taxes

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: The user ID who created or modified the order

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The timestamp of when the order was created or last updated
